changes: Reduced SKILL.md from 295 lines to ~75 lines by removing irrelevant sections (forms, OCR, watermarks, encryption, password protection)
Removed forms.md (206 lines), reference.md (612 lines), LICENSE.txt, and scripts/ directory (form-filling scripts not needed)
Focused content on the three core operations: extract with pdfplumber, create with reportlab, read/merge with pypdf
Added explicit JSON extraction example showing dict(zip(header, row)) pattern
Added complete reportlab Table example with styling for PDF creation tasks
Maintained 100/100 scores on both tasks while reducing document-pdf task cost by 78%
